chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 04 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.24/2024 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of bail application 27.02.2024 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Ali Napar, Advocate for applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel, under instructions, does not press this bail application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
